# Implement local development

In this step, you'll set up the local API server that your frontend will interact with during development. This involves installing dependencies, configuring environment variables, and running the server.

Refer to step 4 of the Local Development Guide for detailed instructions: [4. Set Up the API](..\..\..\LOCAL_DEVELOPMENT.md#4-set-up-the-api)
